text.hero.title: If there’s a decision on your desk that matters. Let's Talk.
text.panel.line: A first conversation costs nothing. What you’ll leave with is at least a clearer sense of the question.
text.expect.title: A calm conversation before any commitment.
text.expect.copy: The first call is not a sales process. It is a chance to name the decision, understand the pressure around it, and work out whether Corbelle is the right partner for the moment.
text.step1.title: Name the decision
text.step1.copy: What is on the table, who is involved, and what makes the timing difficult?
text.step2.title: Clarify the real question
text.step2.copy: We separate the presenting technology issue from the leadership decision underneath it.
text.step3.title: Decide if there is a fit
text.step3.copy: If the work is right for Corbelle, the next step is clear. If it is not, you will still leave with a sharper frame.
